locator.quote: the action as ~£0.023 of gradient — invisible against ±£500/d naked

text: With γ=0.99 λ=0.95, a settle-time close bonus reaches a T−200 close as 0.95^150≈4.6e-4 of magnitude: a £50 bonus arrives at the action as ~£0.023 of gradient — invisible against ±£500/d naked variance.

locator.quote: just doesn't respond to a £10 per-close gradient in 7 days, regardless

text: E1 moved the close bonus to per-tick delivery (the fix that worked for open_cost) but was NO BITE: PPO just doesn't respond to a £10 per-close gradient in 7 days, regardless of when it's delivered.
